_comment: EDIT THIS FILE to change course cards. No HTML/CSS knowledge needed. Add a new object to the array to add a new course card. Keep the structure identical. 'status' can be: waitlist | enrolling | live | coming-soon. 'link' is where the button points (replace # with a Google Form URL later).

courses.title: IBA MBA Quant Mastery
courses.description: A structured, exam-focused path through every quantitative topic the IBA MBA admission test throws at you — built by a Math graduate who has sat the exam.
features: Timed sectional and full mock tests

courses.title: English Mastery Program
courses.description: Grammar, vocabulary, comprehension and writing for admission and job tests — taught as one connected system instead of scattered rules.

courses.title: Bank Job Preparation
courses.description: End-to-end preparation for Bangladesh Bank, combined bank, and private bank written and viva stages — from a working Management Trainee.

courses.title: Competitive Exam Toolkit
courses.description: A cross-exam resource library — formulas, frameworks, checklists and revision systems — usable across BCS, bank, and corporate aptitude tests.
